requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection & Inverter Approval — AS/NZS 4777.2 and Local Distributor
requirement_topic.zh: 电网接入与逆变器审批 — AS/NZS 4777.2 及当地配电商
requirement_topic.zht: 電網接入與逆變器審批 — AS/NZS 4777.2 及當地配電商

summary.en: Grid-connected BESS and their PCS/inverters must be configured for New Zealand's 230/400 V, 50 Hz supply and comply with AS/NZS 4777.2 where applicable. Connection approval is not granted by a national product list alone: the Electricity Authority sets the regulatory framework, while the local electricity distributor or lines company assesses distributed generation connection applications, protection settings, export limits, metering, and network constraints before energisation.
summary.zh: 并网 BESS 及其 PCS/逆变器须按新西兰 230/400 V、50 Hz 供电配置，并在适用时符合 AS/NZS 4777.2。连接批准并非仅由国家产品目录授予：Electricity Authority 制定监管框架，当地配电商或线路公司在送电前审查分布式发电连接申请、保护设置、输出限制、计量和网络约束。
summary.zht: 併網 BESS 及其 PCS/逆變器須按紐西蘭 230/400 V、50 Hz 供電配置，並在適用時符合 AS/NZS 4777.2。連接批准並非僅由國家產品目錄授予：Electricity Authority 制定監管框架，當地配電商或線路公司在送電前審查分散式發電連接申請、保護設定、輸出限制、計量和網路約束。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS 4777.2 — Grid connection of energy systems via inverters, inverter requirements
Electricity Industry Participation Code — distributed generation connection framework
Electricity Authority — New Zealand electricity-market regulator
Local electricity distributor / lines company connection approval

summary.en: China grid files commonly cite GB/T 36558-2023 for electrochemical energy storage systems and NB/T 42090-2016 or related NB/T standards for PCS and station equipment. China grid connection is designed around Chinese 220/380 V, 50 Hz low-voltage assumptions or project-specific medium-voltage connection studies. Those reports do not establish New Zealand AS/NZS 4777.2 compliance or local distributor approval.
summary.zh: 中国并网文件通常引用 GB/T 36558-2023 电化学储能系统要求，以及 NB/T 42090-2016 或相关 NB/T 标准用于 PCS 和电站设备。中国并网设计通常基于中国 220/380 V、50 Hz 低压假设或项目特定中压接入研究。这些报告不能证明新西兰 AS/NZS 4777.2 合规或当地配电商批准。
summary.zht: 中國併網文件通常引用 GB/T 36558-2023 電化學儲能系統要求，以及 NB/T 42090-2016 或相關 NB/T 標準用於 PCS 和電站設備。中國併網設計通常基於中國 220/380 V、50 Hz 低壓假設或項目特定中壓接入研究。這些報告不能證明紐西蘭 AS/NZS 4777.2 合規或當地配電商批准。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — China electrochemical energy storage grid requirements
NB/T 42090-2016 — China energy-industry standard for storage station / converter equipment

gap.en: The inverter must use New Zealand region settings and protection values, not Australian-only or China-only defaults. The local distributor may impose export limits, dynamic control, anti-islanding, metering, or commissioning evidence beyond the manufacturer's generic AS/NZS report. Chinese GB/T grid tests do not replace AS/NZS 4777.2 evidence or the local connection agreement.
gap.zh: 逆变器须使用新西兰区域设置和保护值，而非仅适用于澳大利亚或中国的默认值。当地配电商可能在制造商通用 AS/NZS 报告之外，附加输出限制、动态控制、防孤岛、计量或投运证据要求。中国 GB/T 并网测试不能替代 AS/NZS 4777.2 证据或本地连接协议。
gap.zht: 逆變器須使用紐西蘭區域設定和保護值，而非僅適用於澳洲或中國的預設值。當地配電商可能在製造商通用 AS/NZS 報告之外，附加輸出限制、動態控制、防孤島、計量或投運證據要求。中國 GB/T 併網測試不能替代 AS/NZS 4777.2 證據或本地連接協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected systems — AS/NZS 4777.2 evidence and local distributor / lines-company approval required before connection where applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN grid-connected systems — China grid approvals do not transfer to New Zealand distributors

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China-made grid-connected BESS should not be commissioned in New Zealand until AS/NZS 4777.2 evidence, New Zealand inverter region settings, and local distributor connection approval are resolved. China GB/T grid-connection reports are not New Zealand approvals.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国制造并网 BESS 在取得 AS/NZS 4777.2 证据、确认新西兰逆变器区域设置并完成当地配电商连接批准前，不应在新西兰投运。中国 GB/T 并网报告不是新西兰批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國製造併網 BESS 在取得 AS/NZS 4777.2 證據、確認紐西蘭逆變器區域設定並完成當地配電商連接批准前，不應在紐西蘭投運。中國 GB/T 併網報告不是紐西蘭批准。
